narrative:
Cols 64-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 996 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
